design_philosophy: Modern, professional veterinary platform combining clinical trust with warm, empathetic pet-care vibes. Uses an Organic & Earthy palette to avoid the cold 'hospital' feel, favoring soft sage greens, warm sand, and terracotta accents for friendly call-to-actions. The UI is clean, spacious, and relies on high-quality pet/doctor imagery with rounded, soft geometric shapes.

typography.heading_strategy: Outfit (font-weight: 700 for H1/H2, tracking-tight). Avoid generic Inter. Use fluid typography scales.

spacing_and_layout.global_padding: Generous spacing. Sections should have py-20 or py-24. Containers use max-w-7xl mx-auto px-6 lg:px-8.
spacing_and_layout.cards: Padding p-6 or p-8 to prevent text collision. Use rounded-2xl or rounded-3xl for a softer, organic feel.
spacing_and_layout.home_hero: Bento Grid 'Tetris' style or asymmetrical split layout. Overlay opacity max bg-black/30 or bg-white/40.
spacing_and_layout.dashboards: 'Control Room' grid. Base grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4 with gap-6.

components_strategy.navigation: Sticky glassmorphism header: backdrop-blur-xl bg-white/80, 1px bottom border border-border/40. Must contain Logo, Links, CTA.
components_strategy.buttons: Rounded-full or rounded-xl. Primary CTA: bg-[#E07A5F] text-white hover:bg-[#D56A4F] hover:-translate-y-0.5 transition-transform duration-200. Secondary: bg-[#F4F1DE] text-[#1E392A] hover:bg-[#EAE5C9].
components_strategy.cards: Surface strategy: 'Neumorphism / Tactile' mix but cleaner. Flat white bg, 1px border-border, subtle shadow-sm. Hover: shadow-md -translate-y-1 transition-all duration-300.
components_strategy.inputs_forms: Rounded-xl, border-[#E2E8F0] focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#81B29A] focus:border-transparent. Generous padding (p-3).
components_strategy.badges: For Specializations: bg-[#81B29A]/10 text-[#2C4A3B] px-3 py-1 rounded-full text-xs font-semibold.
components_strategy.contact_buttons: WhatsApp: bg-[#25D366] text-white. Phone: bg-[#3182CE] text-white.

media.logo_concept: Text-based logo using Outfit font, dark green text with a subtle terracotta paw print icon next to it.

interactions.hover_states: All buttons and cards must have explicitly defined hover states. Buttons: slight scale down active state (active:scale-95), background darken. Cards: subtle upward shift and shadow increase.
interactions.animations: Use simple CSS transitions. transition-all duration-300 ease-in-out.
interactions.testing: Ensure all actionable items have data-testid attributes (e.g., data-testid='book-consultation-btn').

specific_instructions_to_main_agent: If the implementation uses HTML/Vanilla JS as per problem statement, use Tailwind CSS utility classes directly. If using React as per system environment, use shadcn/ui but heavily customize the radius to rounded-2xl and colors to match the guidelines.
Ensure both User and Doctor dashboards have clear, accessible navigation (sidebar or top nav with active states).
For the Doctor Contact feature, render separate clear buttons for Phone and WhatsApp with standard icons (lucide-react or phosphor if React, otherwise FontAwesome/Heroicons via CDN).
Pet image uploads should show a preview of the image using the provided pet_placeholder if none is uploaded.
Feedback system should use star SVGs for ratings. Active stars in Terracotta (#E07A5F), inactive in Gray.
Build the UI without the default 'Bootstrap' look. Emphasize organic spacing (p-6, p-8) and soft border-radii (rounded-2xl).
Do NOT use HTML-based components for advanced user interactions; if using vanilla, create clean custom modals with Tailwind.
